metadata.career_relevance: Core Backtracking Synthesis — Patterns and Optimizations.

key_takeaways: Subsets: add at every call (not just leaves)
Combination Sum: allow reuse (i not i+1); prune with sort+break
N-Queens: valid() check; queens[] array tracks column per row
Pruning is the key optimization: sort + early break can cut O(2^n) dramatically
reflection.next_topic_preview: Module 40 complete! Next: M41 Dynamic Programming.
